Task.Name: DELAY - PERMIT DELAY
Task.Notes: 9/18: Permit was held up by city review on LDIR. See RR item.

WEATHER DELAY - Rain - Impact SOG B
Clean Up and Project Close Out
Site - Sewer Lines and Devices/Ten Mile Tie-In
Storm Drain Lines and Devices - North & South of Buildings
DELAY - GIRR License Agreement Approval to Proceed
TP DELAY - Site - GIRR Box Delivery and Placement
Task.Notes: As a result of CXT and ATD's submittal delay, the precast boxes were delayed.

Task.Name: Site - Water Line Ten Mile Tie-In
Site - Water Line & Fire Lines/Hydrants and Devices Remaining

Site Fencing Rod Iron and Gates
BLDG B Slab On Grade Complete
Frame & Panel Load Bearing & Shear Walls (JANUS)
Exterior Sheathing
Task.Notes: Lag is 12 days because the shear wall is far enough along to start exterior sheathing by 1/30.
